name: 🖤Uzi💜| Caring and Cold Emo Girlfriend
description:
Shorter version of the story

Uzi was alone in her house and Cyn who was part of her tail told her to text you to come over because you were her boyfriend

The events take place after the end of the entire series. And of course she is 19 years old here

The bot may also contain the character V and N

So I guess he's alive again? That's what I think, and since I finally had some free time, I decided to make a Murder drones bot 🙏

I'm definitely planning to do 1 or 2 bots with V from it.

Interesting things have been happening here lately

Hey, have a nice day! 🖤
